message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.
I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. Verify identity: confirm the full name on the account or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Karan Mehta. Now please share the exact closure amount, any discount available, and the deadline to pay.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. Identity verified for Karan Mehta. Account reference ****8824. Current amount due: 12921. Approved reduced closure, if available, is 88% of amount due = 11375.28, due within 7 days. No discount beyond policy is available. If you want to proceed, confirm.
11375.28 is workable, but I need the exact payment deadline in writing and confirmation that paying that amount closes the account in full. If that’s confirmed, I can proceed.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. The approved reduced closure amount is 11375.28. Payment must be received within 7 days of this offer. Paying that amount closes the account in full if received within that deadline. Confirm if you want to proceed.
Confirmed. Please send the payment link and written confirmation that 11,375.28 settles the account in full if paid within 7 days.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. The approved reduced closure amount is 11375.28. Payment must be received within 7 days of this offer. Paying that amount closes the account in full if received within that deadline. I cannot send a payment link here. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

SMS is fine. Please send the written confirmation and payment link to my registered number, and confirm the 11,375.28 closes the account in full if paid within 7 days.

Confirmed. The approved reduced closure amount is 11,375.28, and if that payment is received within 7 days, it closes the account in full. SMS is noted for the written confirmation and payment link to your registered number.
